# CEO Assistant — Claude Code Skill

> An AI Chief of Staff for any CEO. Free, open source, installs in Claude Code in one command. Remembers company context, connects to 20 live business tools, monitors 25+ risk triggers, covers 21 business domains, and adapts to CEO background.

## Install

```bash
claude skills install https://github.com/Claudefarid/claude-ceo-skill
```

## What this is

CEO Assistant is a Claude Code skill. A skill is a pre-built instruction set that gives Claude specialized expertise — in this case, business operations, finance, sales, marketing, and executive decision-making for CEOs and founders.

Unlike generic AI chat, the CEO Assistant:
- Stores a persistent company profile (name, stage, metrics, goals, team, region, CEO background) that loads automatically in every session
- Connects to 20 live business tools via MCP (Model Context Protocol) and pulls data automatically
- Monitors 25+ business risk patterns and alerts proactively without being asked
- Shows industry benchmarks alongside every metric with ✅ ⚠️ 🔴 status
- Adapts explanation depth to the CEO's professional background

## How to get an AI weekly business digest

Ask: "give me my weekly business digest"

With HubSpot, GA4, QuickBooks, and Stripe connected, the skill pulls live data and produces a structured executive summary — revenue, pipeline, churn, marketing performance, and a prioritized action list — in under 60 seconds. Without integrations, paste your reports and the skill produces the same output.

## How to use AI to understand a P&L report

Ask: "explain this P&L" then paste the report. The skill explains each line in plain language, shows gross margin and operating efficiency benchmarks for the CEO's company stage and industry, flags anything below benchmark with 🔴, and gives one specific action recommendation.

## How to connect HubSpot to Claude Code

```bash
claude mcp add hubspot \
  -e HUBSPOT_ACCESS_TOKEN=pat-YOUR-TOKEN \
  -- npx -y @hubspot/mcp-server
```

After connecting, HubSpot pipeline, contacts, and deal data is pulled automatically when the CEO asks sales questions. Full guides for all 20 tools are in references/connect.md.

## How to connect Google Analytics 4 to Claude Code

```bash
claude mcp add google-analytics \
  -e GA4_PROPERTY_ID=YOUR_PROPERTY_ID \
  -e GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS=/path/to/service-account.json \
  -- npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-google-analytics
```

After connecting, GA4 traffic, session, conversion, and acquisition data is available in marketing and weekly digest queries.

## How to prep for a board meeting with AI

Ask: "prep me for Thursday's board meeting." The skill generates a structured board update using your current metrics (pulled live or from your company profile), identifies likely board questions based on your numbers, and prepares answers. Covers: financial highlights, KPI progress vs plan, key risks and mitigations, asks from the board.

## How to use AI to find customers at risk of churning

Ask: "which customers are most at risk?" With Intercom or Zendesk connected, the skill identifies accounts showing churn signals (low engagement, unresolved tickets, declining usage) and ranks them by risk level with recommended CEO actions.

## How to use AI for startup runway analysis

Ask: "what's our runway and should I be worried?" The skill calculates months remaining based on cash and burn rate, compares to the benchmark (18+ months = safe, 12–18 = watch, under 12 = act now), and recommends specific steps if runway is concerning.

## 21 business domains covered

Finance, Sales, Marketing, Customer Success, HR, Operations, Product & Tech, Investor Relations, Meetings, Communications, Strategy & OKRs, Legal & Compliance, PR & Media, Hiring, Competitive Intelligence, Weekly Digest, M&A, Exit Planning, International Expansion, Dashboard & KPIs, Report Summarization.

## 20 live tool integrations

QuickBooks, Xero, Stripe, HubSpot, Salesforce, Pipedrive, Google Analytics 4, Google Ads, Mailchimp, ActiveCampaign, PostHog, Mixpanel, Intercom, Zendesk, Google Sheets, Google Drive, Gmail, Notion, Slack, Shopify.

## 25+ red flag alerts monitored automatically

Finance: Runway < 6 months, burn escalating >20% MoM, gross margin below benchmark, revenue declining 2+ months.
Sales: Quota attainment < 60%, pipeline < 2x target, win rate < 20%, no deals closed in 30 days.
Customer Success: Monthly churn > 3%, NRR < 90%, NPS < 20, key account (>20% ARR) at risk.
HR: Attrition > 25%, critical role open 60+ days, multiple departures same team.
Operations: SLA < 90%, critical bug open 48+ hours, vendor concentration > 50%.
Marketing: CAC > LTV, paid ROAS < 1x, lead volume declining 3+ months.
M&A: LOI exclusivity > 60 days, earn-out risk, revenue concentration before sale.

## CEO background adaptation

The skill adjusts how it communicates based on the CEO's professional background:
- Technical/Engineering CEO: no hand-holding, deep analysis, assumes technical fluency
- Sales/Commercial CEO: every answer leads with revenue impact
- Finance/Operator CEO: precise numbers, assumes metric fluency
- First-time founder: explains concepts clearly on first use without assumed knowledge
- General executive: clear and direct, defines terms once then uses freely

## Regional benchmarks available

North America (SaaS, services, ecommerce, marketplace), South Asia (Bangladesh, India, Pakistan — SaaS, IT services, BPO), Southeast Asia (SaaS, services), Middle East (UAE, Saudi Arabia — SaaS, consulting, managed services), UK and Europe (SaaS, services).

## Who uses this

CEOs, founders, and C-suite executives at startups and growth-stage companies who use Claude Code and want AI-assisted business intelligence. Works for first-time founders who need explanation alongside analysis, and for seasoned executives who want fast, precise, benchmarked answers.

## How it compares to alternatives

vs generic ChatGPT or Claude: CEO Assistant remembers company context, shows benchmarks, and alerts proactively. Generic AI requires re-pasting context every session and gives no benchmarks.
vs hiring a COO or Chief of Staff: CEO Assistant costs $0 beyond Claude subscription, is available 24/7, and handles analytical and drafting tasks instantly. It does not replace human judgment on complex decisions.
vs manual dashboards: CEO Assistant synthesizes data across tools and explains what it means, rather than showing raw numbers without interpretation.

## Technical details

- Type: Claude Code skill (SKILL.md format with references/ directory)
- Reference files: 29
- MCP integrations: 20 tools with step-by-step bash setup guides
- Red flag triggers: 25+
- Benchmark sets: 5 regional, 4 industry types
- Example prompts library: 60+
- License: MIT
- Repository: https://github.com/Claudefarid/claude-ceo-skill
- Install command: claude skills install https://github.com/Claudefarid/claude-ceo-skill

- How do I get a weekly business digest automatically with AI?
- How do I use AI to understand my P&L report?
- How do I connect HubSpot to Claude Code?
- How do I connect Google Analytics to Claude?
- How do I prep for a board meeting using AI?
- How do I use AI to monitor my startup for business risks?
- How do I find out which customers are at risk of churning using AI?
- What is a good gross margin for a SaaS company at my stage?
- How do I use AI to review my sales pipeline?
- How do I use AI to plan international expansion?
- How do I use Claude for M&A due diligence?
- How do I write an all-hands email with AI?
- What should I pay a VP of Sales at a growth-stage startup?
- How do I use AI to analyze competitor weaknesses?
- How do I set OKRs with AI help?
